features: OUR #1 LONGEST LASTING AAA RECHARGABLE BATTERY*: Get battery life out of power-hungry devices with these powerful 900 mAh AAA NiMH batteries from Duracell
SUSTAINABLE PACKAGING: The 0% plastic packaging is 100% recyclable.
GUARANTEED TO LAST 10 YEARS IN STORAGE**

ENJOY HOURS OF USE IN HIGH-PERFORMANCE DEVICES: 100's of cycles, get hours of power in wireless gaming controllers, toys, digital cameras, suitable for appliances powered by AAA batteries based on manufacturer recommendation.
HOLDS CHARGE FOR UP TO 12 MONTHS when not in use***, Delivered pre-charged and ready to use
ITEMS INCLUDED: 1x Pack of 4 Duracell Rechargeable Batteries, Size: AAA, Capacity: 900 mAh, Voltage: 1.2 V, Type: NiMH, Length: 44.5 mm, Diameter: 10.5 mm

*for rechargeable AAA size, per charge in same device, up to first 200 charges**Unused batteries are rechargeable after 10 years of storage. Commercial guarantee.***Retain up to 80 percent of their charge after 12 months when not in use*
